visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim, a middle-aged male with glasses and a checkered cap, points his finger directly at the camera in a medium close-up shot. He is in a studio setting with soft background lighting. Social media logos for Facebook and Instagram appear at the top left, alongside a 'miko' brand logo. (2) The visual transitions to include large text overlays and graphics. An OpenAI logo and icons representing money appear as Tim gestures with his hands, explaining financial costs. The lighting is bright and professional. (3) A digital interface/screen capture of a post from the X platform is shown, detailing a user's question about AI etiquette. Tim remains the central figure, narrating the context. (4) A static image of Sam Altman is overlaid on the screen with a speech bubble. Tim continues to speak, using hand movements to drive the narrative forward. (5) Graphic illustrations representing GPUs, battery levels, and energy calculations appear. Tim explains technical details while the background remains a consistent studio environment. (6) A series of lightbulb icons and water bottle graphics are displayed to visually quantify the energy and water consumption of AI prompts. (7) In the final phase, Tim is shown looking down at a device, simulating a typing action. Text overlays appear showing his polite response to the AI, concluding the educational segment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 你知道嗎. (2) [Slogan]: OpenAI. [Slogan]: 多燒了數千萬美元. (3) [Subtitle]: 一名使用者在X平台詢問說. (4) [Slogan]: 使用Chat GPT. [Slogan]: 請 謝謝. (5) [Subtitle]: 是否會對OpenAI的營運成本造成影響?. (6) [Subtitle]: 大概是幾千萬美元. [Subtitle]: 山姆 阿特曼. [Variety]: 👍. [Subtitle]: 這個錢花的值得. (7) [Slogan]: 大量GPU計算. [Slogan]: 耗電、發熱. (8) [Slogan]: 0.14度電. (9) [Slogan]: 14顆LED的燈. (10) [Slogan]: open AI的水費. (11) [Slogan]: 三罐的瓶裝水. (12) [Variety]: (調皮). [Subtitle]: 回一下 謝謝. [Subtitle]: 辛苦你了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male wearing a black t-shirt, clear-framed glasses, and a black-and-white checkered flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio background with soft, neutral colors and vertical strip lighting accents.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male speaker's energetic, high-arousal voice delivering a punchy hook. A high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat plays in the background. (2) A 'pop' sound effect triggers as the OpenAI logo appears visually, while the speaker maintains a bright, professional tone. (3) A series of 'digital click' and 'UI interface' sound effects occur as text boxes populate the screen. The BGM remains steady and rhythmic. (4) A melodic 'chime' sound effect marks the shift to showing the Sam Altman graphic. The speaker's pitch variability increases to emphasize a specific quote. (5) Fast-paced percussive 'bubble' sound effects are integrated as technical energy data is discussed. The speaker's articulation is very clear. (6) A distinct 'liquid pouring' or 'splash' sound effect is heard when the topic of water cooling is introduced, providing a literal acoustic anchor. (7) The video concludes with a rapid series of 'keyboard typing' sounds as the speaker's voice fades out along with the BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence Presentation -> Comparative Analytics -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a tech-focused educational commentary, aiming to inform the audience about the significant environmental and financial costs—specifically electricity and water—incurred by AI models like ChatGPT, highlighting how even polite social etiquette in prompts increases computational load.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides neutral commentary on OpenAI costs without promoting a specific alternative product or paid service.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-density visual and auditory cues typical of social-native short-form content to maintain high viewer engagement while delivering technical information.
